objective: Sweep EMA Distance Reversion candidates on 1h markets — mean reversion against price stretched from EMA.
outcomeSource: Pyth spot 1h candle direction. This does not include Polymarket market prices or odds.
decisionTiming: For each 1h target candle, decide 35 minutes before that same candle closes using a synthetic current-hour bar built from 1m Pyth candles through HH:25.
